productDisplayName: Puma Men Navy Blue Contest Lo Shoes
description: Style NoteA stylish jogging and walking shoe, the puma Contest Lo is replete with features to enhanced your performance and help you shape up faster with ease. Designed in a low-profile manner, it is created keeping the foot anatomy in mind to make your walks all the more stable and comfortable. Team this with performance clothes when hitting the track or the gym, or simply pair it with jeans and tees for those casual days.Product DetailsBlue shoe with synthetic upper, central lace-ups, perforations and synthetic leather overlays Branding on the midfoot, tongue and heel counterPadded tongue and innerThick rubber midsoleTPU outsole with patterned grooves, pivot points on the forefoot and heel and branded lug on the midfootMaterial and CareSyntheticRub surface with clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
